    *   She remains on screen until 08:20.
    *   The video cuts away from her at 08:20 to show police officers.

    *   End: 08:20

*   Start Time: 04:08 (248 seconds)
*   End Time: 08:20 (500 seconds)
*   Presence: upper-body
*   Face Visible: true
